equations.background: E_ASH(a)^2 = Omega_r a^{-4}+Omega_m a^{-3}+Omega_k a^{-2}+Omega_Lambda+Omega_ASH S_ASH(a)
equations.finite_kernel: K_ASH(k)=exp[-(ln(k/k_*))^2/(2 sigma^2)] exp[-k^2/(2 k_uv^2)] sum_q c_q cos(q pi log_2(k/k_*))/(1+lambda_q/40)
equations.growth: D_xx + [2+dlnH/dlna+gamma_ASH(a,k)] D_x - 3/2 Omega_m(a) mu_ASH(a,k)D = 0, x=ln a
